---
title: "07. дәӨж„ҹдёҺе…ізі»"
subtitle: "Mutual Influence, Union, and Relationship"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 7
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How influence, duration, family order, opposition, decrease/increase, gathering, joy, and trust map relational structure onto ring arithmetic, spectral modes, and fold-based repair."
---

**Hexagrams:** йҡҸ(17), иӣҠ(18), е’ё(31), жҒ’(32), е®¶дәә(37), зқҪ(38), жҚҹ(41), зӣҠ(42), иҗғ(45), е…‘(58), дёӯеӯҡ(61)  
**Omega Directions:** `ring arithmetic`, `spectral theory`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_07_mutual_influence_relationship.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
